description_long: This is a round, black frying pan with a wide, shallow cooking surface and a single elongated handle extending from one side. The pan's body appears to be made of metal, likely cast iron or nonstick-coated steel, with a slightly mottled or speckled finish. The handle is straight, solid, and dark in color, possibly made of heat-resistant plastic or coated metal, and is attached securely to the pan. The rim of the pan is thin and straight, with no visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. There are no visible brand logos or markings on the pan or handle. The bottom surface of the pan appears smooth and unmarked, lacking any visible ridges, patterns, or stamps.
description: A round, black metal frying pan with a straight, dark handle and a smooth, unmarked bottom. The pan has a thin, straight rim and a mottled finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the round, shallow pan body and the full length of the straight handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view with the handle centered and extending toward the viewer, highlighting the circular shape of the pan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle extending to the left, showing the pan's depth and the attachment point of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle pointing away, emphasizing the round cooking surface and the handle's end.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of dark plastic or coated metal, solid and non-ergonomic, with no visible grip texture or special design elements.
attribute_rim_design: Thin, straight rim with no flaring, rolling, or pouring spouts; simple and functional.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and unmarked bottom surface with no visible ridges, patterns, or stamps.
